name: architect-prime-nodejs
description: Architect-Prime primary runnable Node.js TypeScript API with Prisma database baseline

scripts.dev: prisma generate && prisma migrate deploy && tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db npm run test:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db vitest run --coverage
scripts.test:unit: cross-env NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db vitest run src/tests/unit
scripts.test:integration: cross-env NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db npm run test:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db vitest run src/tests/integration
scripts.test:smoke: cross-env NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db npm run test:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db vitest run src/tests/smoke
scripts.coverage: cross-env NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db npm run test:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db vitest run --coverage
